infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Flusso uses the camera to let you take a photo for your profile picture, for example capturing a new photo to set as your account avatar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Flusso allows you to select a photo from your library to use as your profile picture, for example choosing an existing image as your account avatar.

plugins.photosPermission: Flusso allows you to select a photo from your library to use as your profile picture, for example choosing an existing image as your account avatar.
plugins.cameraPermission: Flusso uses the camera to let you take a photo for your profile picture, for example capturing a new photo to set as your account avatar.

plugins.contactsPermission: Flusso accesses your contacts to detect birthdays and other saved dates and add them to your calendar, for example showing a reminder for a contact's birthday.
